Application Procedures

All teaching and administrative staff who wish to take part in staff mobility should complete their application via

https://turnaportal.ua.gov.tr/

during the application time.

Applications without invitation letter will be considered as “ineligible.”

Official Invitation Letter (signed and stamped by the receiving institution)

Erasmus+ HE Staff Mobility agreement – training (signed and stamped by host institution)

CV: Could be in English and Turkish

English Language Proficiency Test Result

Official Invitation Letter (signed and stamped by the receiving institution)

Erasmus+ HE Staff Mobility agreement – teaching (signed and stamped by host institution)

CV: Could be in English and Turkish.
